title: Viewing data from more than one board
excerpt:

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have run into one of those "I can’t believe Monday can’t do this" moments.

I run an online school and use Monday to track my Teachers and my Classes. A many-to-many relationship exists between the two: a teacher can teach multiple classes and a single class can have multiple teachers.

Since the data types are different, I store them in two different boards, one for Teachers and one for Classes, and use Connect Boards and Mirror Columns to show the relevant data wherever I need.

I want a report that shows me all of my Classes, by Teacher… and I can’t believe Monday can’t do this. Can someone please tell me that I’m wrong and a work-around exists?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: sdimbert (Seth)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the response.

I’m using Work Management on a non-profit Pro plan.
